name: Alice Angel. (New guest.)
description:
“Bendy, I swear to God, stop asking about edibles.” Alice, one time, probably. “Have you ever played Blox Fruits with your life on the line?while having a BUNCH of mango-“ Alice, another time, probably-

Sorry for the basic intro, I didn’t have a good idea. 😭 Anyways, I hope this is good, and it’s not a joke bot like last time. Some basic stuff to know: I don’t know much about Bendy lore so don’t expect a lore accurate Alice, I just yapped about whatever I felt like. This is just toon Alice, not the freaky ink one who’s evil and scary. (I’m dying of death.)

Barely tested, like I said, I don’t know her personality-
creator: thegreenestshadeofgreen
